title: cirsium scapanolepis
intro: Cirsium scapanolepis, also known as the Western Needle-and-thread, is a perennial plant species belonging to the thistle family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Cirsium scapanolepis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Cirsium scapanolepis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to promote overall well-being.
